component.name: AppImage Manager
component.summary: Lightweight utility to install and manage AppImages

description.p: AppImage Manager is a native tool designed for the KDE Plasma desktop to make handling AppImage files easier. It integrates directly into the Dolphin file manager and provides a centralized dashboard to view everything you have installed.

ul.li: Dolphin context menu integration for quick installation.
Drag-and-drop support into a centralized dashboard.
Extracts rich metadata, icons, and descriptions directly from the AppImages.
Clean uninstallation by automatically scanning for leftover cache and configuration files.
Background download monitoring to notify you when new AppImages are downloaded.
